summary: Wave-8 high-priority remediation (track: wave8-high-remediation:phase1:task1.0) cannot auto-ratify under --full-auto due to three simultaneous blocking signals: (1) NHT does_block: true — overall_severity material_concern persists in attempt-2 reverification, with finding-K (BC-8 multi-strategy aggregation), NEW-1 (USDJPY unit-convention 150x cost overstatement relative to backtest engine), and NEW-2 (cost-feedback into operational equity dd_contract/kill_switch deferred); (2) CRO VETO on BC-8 closure — account-key parity gate addresses multi-account scenario but not cross-process [read->check->dispatch] race on one account, permitting transient ~24-30% aggregate JPY-correlated exposure vs the 15% BC-8 cap; second-loop (carry_fred regime-conditional) authorization BLOCKED until Wave-9 residual control lands (per-strategy 7.5% budget tickets or cross-process file-lock); (3) Principal Reviewer REJECT with 3 blocking findings — F-001 (USDJPY 150x cost formula mismatch vs engine _to_engine_units), F-002 (HIGH-1c parity test runs on EURUSD not USDJPY per spec instrument-universe), F-003 (330 production LoC added vs 50-line hard constraint). CRO and NHT also disagree on cost-feedback architecture (CRO: log-only is correct; NHT: log-only is material_concern) — requires PM spec amendment or CEO ruling. Recommended single-loop closure path: CEO accepts documented gaps, authorizes vt-only paper loop, dispatches Wave-9 for BC-8 residual control + USDJPY unit-convention fix.
